species: because it was the only of these that was described to be essential in human cells.
cell_type: In order to understand the function of CEP44 at centrioles, we knocked down the expression of CEP44 in RPE1 h-TERT cells via siRNA for 72 h.
disease_state: no disease mentioned, but healthy cells are used
sample_source: human telomerase-immortalised retinal pigment epithelial cells
Human telomerase-immortalised retinal pigment epithelial cells (hTERT-RPE1, RPE1) CEP44−/− clones and stable cell lines described in this work were cultured...
cell_line: In order to understand the function of CEP44 at centrioles, we knocked down the expression of CEP44 in RPE1 h-TERT cells via siRNA for 72 h.
